title: The Straw Hats Enter the Sun World
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Zoro, Unknown person #9, Luffy, Dorry as Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.
scene: Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It says what?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We attacked Egghead?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: According to the morning paper...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Why would they lie like that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's too small to make out!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'll read it aloud.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "The giant warrior pirates have awoken after a century-long absence!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "They set egghead Ablaze with Emperor straw hat Luffy!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "The captains of this legendary crew, Brogy the Red Ogre and Dorry the Blue Ogre, have received new bouties of 1.8 billion berries Apiece!!!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: THEY CHANGED OUR BOUNTIES?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: 1.8 BILLION!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We didn't intend on making a comeback...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your bounties used to be only 100 million! That's quite a jump!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Prices would've changed a great deal in the last 100 years.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This amount seems reasonable for you captains...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: They're also blaming Luffy for vegapunk's murder.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: They're always changing the narrative!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WAHA ha ha ha ha ha! so you guys killed me, huh?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shaddup!! We fought tooth and nail to save you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: When was this taken?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Wej somehow always gets their scoop, even on egghead...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whoever took this picture probably got a handsome reward.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, when lofty turns into that "Freedom form" of his...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Does he normally get this mark on his arm?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not sure. He was hopping around too much for me to see.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...it seems off.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: His arm is blurry...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: But the mark is crystal clear...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Why worry about it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It just seems familiar...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So straw hat is officially on a similar standing as red hair, right???

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Even that whisper- snapper of ours. Hajrudin,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Is under your umbrella I hear.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That Rambunctious brat is the king's own kid, you know?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Really?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He wanted to come fetch you himself, but we had seniority.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Besides, someone's gotta keep an eye out for trouble in Elbaf.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Trouble?

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Opens through 39 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
